1705520.name: My Furry Neighbour 🐾
1705520.description:
Life can be boring sometimes—work, daily routines... Who can change that? A new neighbor, of course! Especially a sexy goth one!

Her name is Roxy, and she’s very interested in our hero. As they spend time together, he begins to experience new feelings he never knew before. But will he be able to overcome his insecurities and date her? Find out for yourself in "My Furry Neighbour"!

"My Furry Neighbour" is a short visual novel about hidden traumas, relationships, and new challenges in life. Experience the romantic story of an ordinary otaku and his new love, spend time with the characters, and discover what happened to Roxy in the past.

Features:

  • A captivating new sexy neighbor!

  • An engaging story with romance and comedy elements

  • HD, fully original artwork

  • Multiple choice options

  • Approximately 2 hours of content

  • A relaxing atmosphere

  • Great music
